mapper.insert: insert into orders(order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, created_at, updated_at) values(#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: select id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, logistics_company, logistics_no, created_at, updated_at from orders where order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.insert: insert into order_item(order_id, book_id, book_title, book_cover, price, quantity, subtotal) values (#{orderId}, #{bookId}, #{bookTitle}, #{bookCover}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{subtotal})
mapper.select: select id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, logistics_company, logistics_no, created_at, updated_at from orders where id = #{id}
select id, order_id, book_id, book_title, book_cover, price, quantity, subtotal from order_item where order_id = #{orderId}

select * from orders
and status = #{status}
and (order_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or receiver_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or receiver_phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by created_at desc
